query:
mutation createClientSignup(
    $firstName: String!
    $middleName: String
    $lastName: String!
    $email: String!
    $phone: String!
    $countryCode: Int!
    $password: String!
    $confirmPassword: String!
    $isAgree: Boolean
    $visitorId: String
    $socialSignUp: Boolean
  ) {
    createClientSignup(
      firstName: $firstName
      middleName: $middleName
      lastName: $lastName
      email: $email
      phone: $phone
      countryCode: $countryCode
      password: $password
      confirmPassword: $confirmPassword
      isAgree: $isAgree
      visitorId: $visitorId
      socialSignUp: $socialSignUp
    ) {
      status
      message
      errors
      clientUser {
        id
        email
        firstName
        lastName
        phoneNumber
      }
    }
  }

mutation socialLogin($email: String, $name: String, $token: String) {
    socialLogin(email: $email, name: $name, appleToken: $token) {
      user {
        id
        firstName
        lastName
        email
        dateOfBirth
        #profilePic
        phoneNumber
        state
        city
        country
      }
      token
      isVerified
      userIsExist
      refreshToken
      status
      message
      errors
    }
  }

mutation careProviders(
    $careProviderType: String!
    $sortPrice: String!
    $primaryLanguage: String!
    $secondaryLanguage: String!
    $isTalkNow: String!
    $modalityFormatChoice: String!
    $minPrice: String!
    $maxPrice: String!
    $careProviderModality: String!
    $gender: String!
    $age: String!
    $sexuality: String!
  ) {
    careProviders(
      careProviderType: $careProviderType
      sortPrice: $sortPrice
      primaryLanguage: $primaryLanguage
      secondaryLanguage: $secondaryLanguage
      isTalkNow: $isTalkNow
      modalityFormatChoice: $modalityFormatChoice
      minPrice: $minPrice
      maxPrice: $maxPrice
      careProviderModality: $careProviderModality
      gender: $gender
      age: $age
      sexuality: $sexuality
    ) {
      status
      message
      errors
      data {
        user {
          id
          email
          firstName
          middleName
          lastName
          phoneNumber
          userType
        }
        careProviderType {
          id
          name
        }
        price
        isTalkNow
      }
    }
  }

mutation GetProfiles($masterUserId: UUID!) {
    getProfiles(masterUserId: $masterUserId) {
      status
      message
      profiles {
        id
        firstName
        middleName
        lastName
        profilePic
        profileType
        isClientLocationVerified
        isPrimaryAccount
        ageVulnerabilityCheck
        dateOfBirth
        streetAddress
        flatBuildingNo
        streetAddress
        latitude
        longitude
        city
        country
        state
        zip
        phoneNumber
        primaryLanguage {
          id
          name
          __typename
        }
        secondaryLanguage {
          id
          name
          __typename
        }
        userType
        email
        isPrimaryAccount
        relationship
        relationshipFileDocument
        typeDocumentAuthority
        countryCode {
          id
          label
        }
        parentUser {
          id
        }
        profileType
      }
    }
  }

mutation CreateProfile(
    $email: String!
    $firstName: String!
    $middleName: String
    $lastName: String!
    $phoneNumber: String
    $dateOfBirth: Date
    $gender: String
    $primaryLanguage: Int
    $secondaryLanguage: [Int]
    $streetAddress: String
    $flatBuildingNo: String
    $city: String!
    $state: String!
    $country: String!
    $zip: String!
    $isVerified: Boolean
    $profilePic: String
    $relationship: String
    $profileType: String
    $countryCode: Int
    $relationshipFirstName: String
    $relationshipMiddleName: String
    $relationshipLastName: String
    $relationshipEmail: String
    $relationshipPhoneNumber: String
    $relationshipStreetAddress: String
    $relationshipCity: String
    $relationshipState: String
    $relationshipCountry: String
    $relationshipCountryCode: Int
    $relationshipZip: String
    $masterUserId: String
    $relationshipFileDocument: String
    $typeDocumentAuthority: String
  ) {
    createProfile(
      email: $email
      firstName: $firstName
      middleName: $middleName
      lastName: $lastName
      phoneNumber: $phoneNumber
      dateOfBirth: $dateOfBirth
      gender: $gender
      primaryLanguage: $primaryLanguage
      secondaryLanguage: $secondaryLanguage
      streetAddress: $streetAddress
      flatBuildingNo: $flatBuildingNo
      city: $city
      state: $state
      country: $country
      zip: $zip
      isVerified: $isVerified
      profilePic: $profilePic
      relationship: $relationship
      profileType: $profileType
      countryCode: $countryCode
      relationshipFirstName: $relationshipFirstName
      relationshipMiddleName: $relationshipMiddleName
      relationshipLastName: $relationshipLastName
      relationshipEmail: $relationshipEmail
      relationshipPhoneNumber: $relationshipPhoneNumber
      relationshipStreetAddress: $relationshipStreetAddress
      relationshipCity: $relationshipCity
      relationshipState: $relationshipState
      relationshipCountry: $relationshipCountry
      relationshipCountryCode: $relationshipCountryCode
      relationshipZip: $relationshipZip
      masterUserId: $masterUserId
      relationshipFileDocument: $relationshipFileDocument
      typeDocumentAuthority: $typeDocumentAuthority
    ) {
      status
      message
      errors
      userCustomer {
        id
        firstName
        middleName
        lastName
        email
        phoneNumber
        userType
        dateOfBirth
        streetAddress
        flatBuildingNo
        city
        state
        profilePic
        country
        zip
        gender
        isVerified
        profileType
        parentUser {
          id
          email
          firstName
          lastName
        }
      }
    }
  }

mutation CreateClient(
    $city: String
    $country: String
    $dateOfBirth: Date
    $email: String
    $firstName: String
    $flatBuildingNo: String
    $gender: String
    $lastName: String
    $isVerified: Boolean
    $middleName: String
    $phoneNumber: String
    $countryCode: Int
    $primaryLanguage: Int
    $profilePic: String
    $secondaryLanguage: [Int]
    $state: String
    $streetAddress: String
    $vulnerability1: String
    $vulnerability2: String
    $zip: String
    $relationship: String
    $relationshipFirstName: String
    $relationshipMiddleName: String
    $relationshipLastName: String
    $relationshipEmail: String
    $relationshipPhoneNumber: String
    $relationshipStreetAddress: String
    $relationshipFlatBuildingNo: String
    $relationshipCity: String
    $relationshipState: String
    $relationshipCountry: String
    $relationshipZip: String
    $relationshipFileDocument: String
    $typeDocumentAuthority: String
    $relationshipCountryCode: Int
  ) {
    createClient(
      email: $email
      firstName: $firstName
      middleName: $middleName
      lastName: $lastName
      phoneNumber: $phoneNumber
      countryCode: $countryCode
      isVerified: $isVerified
      gender: $gender
      primaryLanguage: $primaryLanguage
      secondaryLanguage: $secondaryLanguage
      dateOfBirth: $dateOfBirth
      streetAddress: $streetAddress
      flatBuildingNo: $flatBuildingNo
      city: $city
      state: $state
      profilePic: $profilePic
      country: $country
      zip: $zip
      vulnerability1: $vulnerability1
      vulnerability2: $vulnerability2
      relationship: $relationship
      relationshipFirstName: $relationshipFirstName
      relationshipMiddleName: $relationshipMiddleName
      relationshipLastName: $relationshipLastName
      relationshipEmail: $relationshipEmail
      relationshipPhoneNumber: $relationshipPhoneNumber
      relationshipStreetAddress: $relationshipStreetAddress
      relationshipFlatBuildingNo: $relationshipFlatBuildingNo
      relationshipCity: $relationshipCity
      relationshipState: $relationshipState
      relationshipCountry: $relationshipCountry
      relationshipZip: $relationshipZip
      relationshipFileDocument: $relationshipFileDocument
      relationshipCountryCode: $relationshipCountryCode
      typeDocumentAuthority: $typeDocumentAuthority
    ) {
      status
      message
      errors
      userCustomer {
        id
        firstName
        middleName
        lastName
        email
        phoneNumber
        userType
        dateOfBirth
        streetAddress
        flatBuildingNo
        city
        state
        profilePic
        country
        zip
        gender
        vulnerability1
        vulnerability2
        isVerified
      }
    }
  }

mutation CreateCareProvider(
    $visitorId: String
    $academicDegree: [AcademicDegreeInput]
     $preLicensed: [PreLicensedInput]
    $ageGroup: [Int]
    $behavioralSupport: [Int]
    $careProviderId: Int
    $careProviderType: Int
    $clientNeeds: [Int]
    $communities: [Int]
    $confirmPassword: String
    $credentialStatus: [Int]
    $credentialType: [Int]
    $email: String
    $ethnicity: [Int]
    $faith: [Int]
    $fieldsOfExpertise: [Int]
    $coreCompetancies: [Int]
    $workStyle: [Int]
    $careSupport: [Int]
    $firstName: String
    $genders: [Int]
    $growthFrameworks: [Int]
    $isTalkNow: Boolean
    $isAgree: Boolean
    $isVerified: Boolean
    $lastName: String
    $middleName: String
    $modalities: [ModalitiesInput]
    $myIdentityAge: Int
    $myIdentityEthnicityAndRace: [Int]
    $myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation: [Int]
    $myIdentityGender: Int
    $myIdentityPronouns: Int
    $myIdentitySexuality: Int
    $myRole: [Int]
    $myLivedExperience: [Int]
    $password: String
    $phoneNumber: String
    $primaryLanguage: Int
    $professionalCertificate: [ProfessionalCertificateInput]
    $professionalMembership: [ProfessionalMembershipInput]
    $professionalLicense: [ProfessionalLicenseInput]
    $secondaryLanguage: [Int]
    $sexuality: [Int]
    $stripeId: String
    $iAmNotAbleToTreat: [Int]
    $treatmentApproaches: [Int]
    $fieldsOfExpertiseOther: [FieldsOfExpertiseOtherInput]
    $growthFrameworksOther: [GrowthFrameworksOtherInput]
    $stepCount: String
    $anticipatedCompletionDate: Date
    $expirationDate: Date
    $yearsInPractices: Int
    $completedPracticeHours: Int
    $completedSupervisedPracticeHours: Int
    $completedTrainingHours: Int
    $npiYearGranted: Int
    $npiValidUntil: Int
    $npiNumber: String
    $liabilityInsuranceCarrier: String
    $insurancePolicyNumber: String
    $continuingEducationHours: Int
    $completedCoachingHours: Int
    $isLicensed: Boolean
    $country: String
    $state: String
    $gender: String
    $countryCode: Int
    $isGlobalDiscovery: Boolean
    $affiliateLink: String
    $profileHandle: String
    $isPhoneVerified: Boolean
    $agreeCredentialStatus: Boolean
  ) {
    createCareProvider(
      visitorId: $visitorId
      careProviderId: $careProviderId
      stripeCustomerId: $stripeId
      stepCount: $stepCount
      firstName: $firstName
      middleName: $middleName
      lastName: $lastName
      email: $email
      isAgree: $isAgree
      isVerified: $isVerified
      isTalkNow: $isTalkNow
      phoneNumber: $phoneNumber
      password: $password
      confirmPassword: $confirmPassword
      primaryLanguage: $primaryLanguage
      careProviderType: $careProviderType
      myRole: $myRole
      growthFrameworks: $growthFrameworks
      fieldsOfExpertise: $fieldsOfExpertise
      clientNeeds: $clientNeeds
      treatmentApproaches: $treatmentApproaches
      behavioralSupport: $behavioralSupport
      ethnicity: $ethnicity
      ageGroup: $ageGroup
      genders: $genders
      sexuality: $sexuality
      myLivedExperience: $myLivedExperience
      faith: $faith
      communities: $communities
      secondaryLanguage: $secondaryLanguage
      credentialStatus: $credentialStatus
      credentialType: $credentialType
      professionalCertificate: $professionalCertificate
      academicDegree: $academicDegree
      preLicensed: $preLicensed
      professionalMembership: $professionalMembership
      myIdentityAge: $myIdentityAge
      myIdentityGender: $myIdentityGender
      myIdentityPronouns: $myIdentityPronouns
      myIdentitySexuality: $myIdentitySexuality
      myIdentityEthnicityAndRace: $myIdentityEthnicityAndRace
      myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation: $myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation
      modalities: $modalities
      professionalLicense: $professionalLicense
      iAmNotAbleToTreat: $iAmNotAbleToTreat
      coreCompetancies: $coreCompetancies
      workStyle: $workStyle
      careSupport: $careSupport
      fieldsOfExpertiseOther: $fieldsOfExpertiseOther
      growthFrameworksOther: $growthFrameworksOther
      anticipatedCompletionDate: $anticipatedCompletionDate
      expirationDate: $expirationDate
      yearsInPractices: $yearsInPractices
      completedPracticeHours: $completedPracticeHours
      completedSupervisedPracticeHours: $completedSupervisedPracticeHours
      completedTrainingHours: $completedTrainingHours
      npiYearGranted: $npiYearGranted
      npiValidUntil: $npiValidUntil
      npiNumber: $npiNumber
      liabilityInsuranceCarrier: $liabilityInsuranceCarrier
      insurancePolicyNumber: $insurancePolicyNumber
      continuingEducationHours: $continuingEducationHours
      completedCoachingHours: $completedCoachingHours
      isLicensed: $isLicensed
      country: $country
      state: $state
      gender: $gender
      countryCode: $countryCode
      isGlobalDiscovery: $isGlobalDiscovery
      affiliateLink: $affiliateLink
      profileHandle: $profileHandle
      isPhoneVerified: $isPhoneVerified
      agreeCredentialStatus: $agreeCredentialStatus
    ) {
      status
      errors
      message
      data {
        id
        isGlobalDiscovery
        stepCounter
        user {
          id
          email
          profilePic
          firstName
          middleName
          isVerified
          lastName
          phoneNumber
          userType
          primaryLanguage {
            id
            name
          }
          isAgree
          secondaryLanguage {
            id
            name
          }
          city
          state
          streetAddress
          flatBuildingNo
          country
          zip
        }
        inPersonLocation {
          fullNameOrPracticeName
          addressLine1
          addressLine2
          city
          state
          country {
            id
          }
          inPersonRegion
          zipCode
          latitude
          longitude
        }
        careProviderType {
          id
          name
        }
        isTalkNow
        isVerified
        isFavourite
        sexuality {
          id
          name
        }
        ageGroup {
          id
          name
        }
        genders {
          id
          name
        }
        myRole {
          id
          name
        }
        clientNeeds {
          id
          name
        }
        ethnicity {
          id
          name
        }
        faith {
          id
          name
        }
        communities {
          id
          name
        }
        credentialStatus {
          id
          name
        }
        growthFrameworks {
          id
          name
        }
        growthFrameworksOther {
          value
        }
        fieldsOfExpertise {
          id
          name
        }
        fieldsOfExpertiseOther {
          value
        }
        myIdentityAge {
          id
          name
        }
        myIdentityGender {
          id
          name
        }
        myIdentityPronouns {
          id
          name
        }
        myIdentitySexuality {
          id
          name
        }
        myIdentityEthnicityAndRace {
          id
          name
        }
        myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation {
          id
          name
        }
        modalities {
          modality {
            id
            name
          }
          format {
            id
            formatName {
              id
              name
            }
            price
            duration
            inPersonLocation {
              id
              fullNameOrPracticeName
              addressLine1
              addressLine2
              city
              state
              country {
                id
                name
              }
              inPersonRegion
              zipCode
            }
          }
        }
        credentialType {
          id
          credentialType {
            id
            name
          }
          professionalMembership {
            id
            membershipOrganization
            membershipType
            membershipNumber
            yearGranted
            validUntil
          }
          professionalCertificate {
            id
            issuingOrganization {
              id
              name
            }
            certificateLevel {
              id
              certificationLevelName
            }
            certificateNumber
            professionalCertificateYearGranted
            professionalCertificateValidUntil
            certificateName
            issuingOrganizationText
          }
          academicDegree {
            id
            degreeType
            degreeName
            degreeGrantingInstitution
            honorsOfEmphasis
            academicDegreeYearGranted
          }
          professionalLicense {
            id
            issuingOrganization
            isActive
            licenseName
            credentialAbbreviation
            licenseNumber
            professionalLicenseYearGranted
            professionalLicenseValidUntil
            country
            state
          }
        }
        coreCompetancies {
          id
          name
        }
        workStyle {
          id
          name
        }
        treatmentApproaches {
          id
          treatmentApproaches {
            id
            name
          }
        }
        careSupport {
          id
          name {
            id
            name
          }
        }
        completedTrainingHours {
          id
          completedTrainingsHours
        }
        completedCoachingHours {
          id
          completedCoachingsHours
        }
        iAmNotAbleToTreat {
          id
          name
        }
        anticipatedCompletionDate
        npiNumber
        liabilityInsuranceCarrier
        insurancePolicyNumber
        npiYearGranted
        npiValidUntil
        expirationDate
        completedSupervisedPracticeHours {
          id
          hoursCategory
        }
        completedPracticeHours {
          id
          hoursCategory
        }
        continuingEducationHours {
          id
          hoursCategory
        }
        yearsInPractices {
          id
          yearsInPractice
        }
        isLicensed
      }
    }
  }

mutation managePagesMutation(
    $profileCardImage: String
    $profileCardName: String
    $cardTitle: String
    $cardKeyServicesList:[String]
    $additionalModules: [AdditionalModulesInputList]
    $bannerImage: String
    $careProviderId: Int
    $description: String
    $keyServices: String
    $managePageId: Int
    $myRole: [Int]
    $clientNeeds: [Int]
    $fieldsOfExpertise: [Int]
    $coreCompetancies: [Int]
    $workStyle: [Int]
    $careSupport: [Int]
    $growthFrameworks: [Int]
    $treatmentApproaches: [Int]
    $behavioralSupport: [Int]
    $pageLanguage: Int
    $pageTitle: String
    $primarySpecialityId: [Int]
    $primarySpecialityName: String
    $primarySpecialityType: String
    $profileImages: [ManagePageProfileImagesVideosInput]
    $profileVideos: [ManagePageProfileImagesVideosInput]
    $specialityOrGroupName: String
    $profile: String
    $stepCount: Int
    $pageNumber: Int
    $keyServicesList: [String]
    $livedExperience: String
    $pageName: String
    $growthFrameworksOther: [String]
    $fieldsOfExpertiseOther: [String]
    $cardProfileHandle: String
  ) {
    managePagesMutation(
      profileCardImage: $profileCardImage
      profileCardName: $profileCardName
      cardTitle: $cardTitle
      cardKeyServicesList: $cardKeyServicesList

      additionalModules: $additionalModules
      bannerImage: $bannerImage
      profile: $profile
      careProviderId: $careProviderId
      description: $description
      keyServices: $keyServices
      stepCount: $stepCount
      managePageId: $managePageId
      pageLanguage: $pageLanguage
      pageTitle: $pageTitle
      primarySpecialityId: $primarySpecialityId
      primarySpecialityName: $primarySpecialityName
      primarySpecialityType: $primarySpecialityType
      profileImages: $profileImages
      profileVideos: $profileVideos
      specialityOrGroupName: $specialityOrGroupName
      pageNumber: $pageNumber
      myRole: $myRole
      clientNeeds: $clientNeeds
      fieldsOfExpertise: $fieldsOfExpertise
      coreCompetancies: $coreCompetancies
      workStyle: $workStyle
      careSupport: $careSupport
      growthFrameworks: $growthFrameworks
      treatmentApproaches: $treatmentApproaches
      behavioralSupport: $behavioralSupport
      keyServicesList: $keyServicesList
      livedExperience: $livedExperience
      pageName: $pageName
      growthFrameworksOther: $growthFrameworksOther
      fieldsOfExpertiseOther: $fieldsOfExpertiseOther
      cardProfileHandle: $cardProfileHandle
    ) {
      status
      message
      errors
      data {
        id
        cardProfileHandle
        careProvider {
          id
        }
        pageTitle
        pageLanguage {
          id
        }
        myRole {
          id
          name
        }
        clientNeeds {
          id
          name
        }
        fieldsOfExpertise {
          id
          name
        }
        coreCompetancies {
          id
          name
        }
        workStyle {
          id
          name
        }
        careSupport {
          id
          name {
            id
            name
            __typename
          }
          __typename
        }
        growthFrameworks {
          id
          name
        }
        behavioralSupport {
          id
          behavioralSupportCategory
          name {
            id
            name
            __typename
          }
          __typename
        }
        primarySpecialityType
        primarySpecialityId
        primarySpecialityName
        bannerImage
        profileImages {
          id
          profileImages
          uploadOrder
        }
        profileVideos {
          id
          profileVideos
          uploadOrder
        }
        specialityOrGroupName
        description
        keyServices
        additionalModules {
          id
          layoutType
          image
          video
          heading
          description
          videoTitle
          videoDescription
        }
        keyServicesList
      }
    }
  }

mutation UpdateClientAddress(
  $streetAddress: String!, 
  $city: String!, 
  $state: String!, 
  $country: String!, 
  $zip: String!, 
  $latitude: Float!, 
  $longitude: Float!,
  $clientId: String
) {
  updateClientAddress(
    streetAddress: $streetAddress,
    city: $city,
    state: $state,
    country: $country,
    zip: $zip,
    latitude: $latitude,
    longitude: $longitude
    clientId : $clientId
  ) {
    success
    message
  }
}

query careProviders(
    $careProviderType: [String]
    $sortPrice: String
    $page: Int
    $pageSize: Int
    $primaryLanguage: [Int]
    $secondaryLanguage: [Int]
    $isTalkNow: Boolean
    $modalityFormatChoice: [String]
    $minPrice: String
    $maxPrice: String
    $careProviderModality: [String]
    $gender: [Int]
    $age: [Int]
    $sexuality: [Int]
    $text: String
    $careProviderEthncities: [Int]
    $faith: [Int]
    $communities: [Int]
    $myIdentitySexuality: [Int]
    $myIdentityEthnicityAndRace: [Int]
    $myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation: [Int]
    $myIdentityPronouns: [Int]
    $myIdentityAge: [Int]
    $myIdentityGender: [Int]
    $latitude: String
    $longitude: String
    $miles: String
    $availability: String
    $availabilityRange: [AvailabilityRangeType]
    $timezone:String
    $isFavourite: Boolean
  ) {
    careProviders(
      careProviderType: $careProviderType
      sortPrice: $sortPrice
      page: $page
      pageSize: $pageSize
      primaryLanguage: $primaryLanguage
      secondaryLanguage: $secondaryLanguage
      isTalkNow: $isTalkNow
      modalityFormatChoice: $modalityFormatChoice
      minPrice: $minPrice
      maxPrice: $maxPrice
      careProviderModality: $careProviderModality
      gender: $gender
      age: $age
      sexuality: $sexuality
      text: $text
      ethnicity: $careProviderEthncities
      faith: $faith
      communities: $communities
      myIdentitySexuality: $myIdentitySexuality
      myIdentityEthnicityAndRace: $myIdentityEthnicityAndRace
      myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation: $myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation
      myIdentityPronouns: $myIdentityPronouns
      myIdentityAge: $myIdentityAge
      myIdentityGender: $myIdentityGender
      latitude: $latitude
      longitude: $longitude
      miles: $miles
      availability: $availability
      availabilityRange: $availabilityRange
      timezone:$timezone
      isFavourite: $isFavourite
    ) {
      status
      errors
      message
      data {
        id
        isFavourite
        scores {
          overallScore
        }
        isSterlingVerified
        threeClientNeeds {
          name
          id
        }
        totalClientNeeeds
        inPersonLocation {
          id
          latitude
          longitude
          city
          fullNameOrPracticeName
          addressLine1
          addressLine2
          state
          zipCode
          inPersonRegion
          country {
            id
            name
            __typename
          }
          __typename
        }
        behavioralSupport {
          id
          behavioralSupportCategory
          name {
            id
            name
            __typename
          }
          __typename
        }
        growthFrameworks {
          id
          name
          __typename
        }
        stepCounter
        user {
          id
          email
          profilePic
          firstName
          middleName
          lastName
          phoneNumber
          isVerified
          userType
          primaryLanguage {
            id
            name
          }
          secondaryLanguage {
            id
            name
          }
          city
          state
          streetAddress
          flatBuildingNo
          country
          zip
        }
        title
        cpProfileImage
        careProviderType {
          id
          name
        }
        isLicensed
        rating
        isTalkNow
        isVerified
        isFavourite
        price

        fieldsOfExpertise {
          id
          name
        }
        treatmentApproaches {
          treatmentApproachesCategory
        }
        coreCompetancies {
          name
        }

        workStyle {
          name
        }
        
        careSupport {
          supportCategory
        }
        managePagesCareprovider {
                pageName
                cardProfileHandle
                profileCardName
                isPrimary
                isPublish
        livedExperience
        profileCardImage
        profileCardName
        cardTitle
        cardKeyServicesList
          profile
          pageTitle
          profileImages {
            profileImages
          }
          profileVideos {
            profileVideos
          }
          primarySpecialityName
          primarySpecialityId
          bannerImage
          specialityOrGroupName
          description
          keyServices
          keyServicesList
        }
      }
      page
      totalCount
      hasNextPage
      hasPreviousPage
      careProviderTypeList
    }
  }

query CareProviders(
    $page: Int
    $pageSize: Int
    $text: String
    $careProviderType: [String]
    $sortPrice: String
    $gender: [Int]
    $age: [Int]
    $primaryLanguage: [Int]
    $secondaryLanguage: [Int]
    $isTalkNow: Boolean
    $modalityFormatChoice: [String]
    $minPrice: String
    $maxPrice: String
    $careProviderModality: [String]
    $sexuality: [Int]
    $latitude: String
    $longitude: String
    $miles: String
    $availability: String
    $priceRange: [String]
  ) {
    careProviders(
      page: $page
      pageSize: $pageSize
      text: $text
      careProviderType: $careProviderType
      sortPrice: $sortPrice
      gender: $gender
      age: $age
      primaryLanguage: $primaryLanguage
      secondaryLanguage: $secondaryLanguage
      isTalkNow: $isTalkNow
      modalityFormatChoice: $modalityFormatChoice
      minPrice: $minPrice
      maxPrice: $maxPrice
      careProviderModality: $careProviderModality
      sexuality: $sexuality
      latitude: $latitude
      longitude: $longitude
      miles: $miles
      availability: $availability
      priceRange: $priceRange
    ) {
      status
      message
      errors
      data {
        id
        isTalkNow
        isVerified
        isFavourite
        rating
        price
        cpProfileImage
        careProviderType {
          id
          name
          slug
        }
        user {
          id
          firstName
          middleName
          lastName
          profilePic
        }
      }
    }
  }

query SerpPageFilterQuery($text: String, $filter: Boolean, $careProviderType: [String],
   $sortPrice: String, $primaryLanguage: [Int], $secondaryLanguage: [Int], 
   $isTalkNow: Boolean, $modalityFormatChoice: [String], $minPrice: String, 
   $maxPrice: String, $careProviderModality: [String], $gender: [Int], $age: [Int], 
   $sexuality: [Int], $page: Int, $pageSize: Int, $careProviderEthncities: [Int], $faith: [Int], 
   $communities: [Int], $myIdentitySexuality: [Int], $myIdentityEthnicityAndRace: [Int],
    $myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation: [Int], $myIdentityPronouns: [Int], $myIdentityAge: [Int],
     $myIdentityGender: [Int], $latitude: String, $longitude: String, $miles: String, $availability: String,
      $availabilityRange: [AvailabilityRangeType], $timezone: String,  
      $clientCountry: String, $clientState: String) {
  serpPageResults(
    text: $text
    filter: $filter
    careProviderType: $careProviderType
    sortPrice: $sortPrice
    page: $page
    pageSize: $pageSize
    primaryLanguage: $primaryLanguage
    secondaryLanguage: $secondaryLanguage
    isTalkNow: $isTalkNow
    modalityFormatChoice: $modalityFormatChoice
    minPrice: $minPrice
    maxPrice: $maxPrice
    careProviderModality: $careProviderModality
    gender: $gender
    age: $age
    sexuality: $sexuality
    ethnicity: $careProviderEthncities
    faith: $faith
    communities: $communities
    myIdentitySexuality: $myIdentitySexuality
    myIdentityEthnicityAndRace: $myIdentityEthnicityAndRace
    myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation: $myIdentityFaithAndBackgroundOrientation
    myIdentityPronouns: $myIdentityPronouns
    myIdentityAge: $myIdentityAge
    myIdentityGender: $myIdentityGender
    latitude: $latitude
    longitude: $longitude
    miles: $miles
    availability: $availability
    availabilityRange: $availabilityRange
    timezone: $timezone
    clientCountry: $clientCountry
    clientState: $clientState
  ) {
    status
    message
    errors
    data {
      faq {
        question
        answers
        category {
          name
          __typename
        }
        subcategory {
          name
          __typename
        }
        __typename
      }
      serp {
        title
        description
        content
        category {
          name
          __typename
        }
        subcategory {
          name
          __typename
        }
        __typename
      }
      managePagesList {
        id
        profileCardImage
        profileCardName
        cardTitle
        cardKeyServicesList
        isGlobalDiscovery
        isVerified
        isTalkNow
        overallScore
        isFavourite
        careProviderType {
          id
          name
        }
        cardProfileHandle
        careProvider {
            id
            user {
            firstName
            middleName
            lastName
            __typename
            }
            __typename
        }
        price
        totalAttributeCount
        initailAttributes
        __typename
        }
      page
      totalCount
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}
